title: Which AI Agent Actions Need Human Approval?
titleCandidates: Which AI Agent Actions Need Human Approval?
AI Agent Permissions: What to Automate, Confirm, or Block
Stop Risky AI Agent Actions With a Permission Matrix
thumbnailText: AI AGENT AUTO ASK OR BLOCK
description:
An AI Agent can read untrusted content and still reach real tools. This video gives you a practical permission matrix for deciding which actions can run automatically, which need informed confirmation, and which must be blocked.

What you'll learn:
- How untrusted content becomes a real-world action path
- How to classify actions by consequence, reversibility, and exposure
- How to enforce an Automatic, Confirm, or Block permission tier

Chapters:
00:00 Introduction
00:53 How the Risk Path Forms
03:27 Classify the Consequence
06:06 Enforce the Permission Matrix
09:07 Summary

Follow Tiny Agent. Tiny Agent helps you get better at using AI.
